simple_types.name: IRR_Filter_Kind
simple_types.code: type IRR_Filter_Kind is (Off, X2, X4, X8, X16);

documentation.description:
Sensor modes. Sleep - sensor is off, Forced - measure once and go to
sleep, Normal - measure continuously.

simple_types.name: Oversampling_Kind
simple_types.code: type Oversampling_Kind is (Skip, X1, X2, X4, X8, X16);

documentation.description:
Sensor modes. Sleep - sensor is off, Forced - measure once and go to
sleep, Normal - measure continuously.

simple_types.name: Pressure_Pa
simple_types.code: type Pressure_Pa is delta Pressure_Small range 30_000.0 .. 110_000.0;

simple_types.name: Relative_Humidity
simple_types.code: type Relative_Humidity is delta Humidity_Small range 0.0 .. 100.0;

documentation.description:
Sensor modes. Sleep - sensor is off, Forced - measure once and go to
sleep, Normal - measure continuously.

simple_types.name: Standby_Duration
simple_types.code:
type Standby_Duration is delta 0.5 range 0.5 .. 1000.0
  with Static_Predicate =>
    Standby_Duration in 0.5 | 10.0 | 20.0
      | 62.5 | 125.0 | 250.0 | 500.0 | 1000.0;

record_types.name: Calibration_Constants

documentation.description:
Calibration constants per chip. Make visible to allow constant
initialised to a value known in advance.

subprograms.name: Humidity

documentation.description: Get the humidity from raw values

subprograms.name: Max_Measurement_Time
Pressure

documentation.description: Get the pressure from raw values

subprograms.name: Temperature

documentation.description: Get the temperature from raw values in 0.1 Celsius

subprograms.name: Typical_Measurement_Time
